```py
x1 = tf.constant(1)
x2 = tf.constant(2)
z = tf.add(x1, x2)
```

```py
x1 = tf.Variable(1)
x2 = tf.Variable(2)
z = tf.add(x1,x2)
```

```py
FailedPreconditionError (see above for traceback): Attempting to use uninitialized value Variable
```

```py
x1 = tf.placeholder(tf.float32, [2])
x2 = tf.placeholder(tf.float32, [2])
z = tf.add(x1,x2)
feed_dict={ x1: [1,5], x2: [1,1]}
sess = tf.Session()
sess.run(z, feed_dict)
```

```py
x1 = tf.placeholder(tf.float32, 1)
w1 = tf.placeholder(tf.float32, 1)
x2 = tf.placeholder(tf.float32, 1)
w2 = tf.placeholder(tf.float32, 1)
z1 = tf.multiply(x1,w1)
z2 = tf.multiply(x2,w2)
z3 = tf.add(z1,z2)
```

```py
feed_dict={ x1: [1], w1:[2], x2:[3], w2:[4]}
sess = tf.Session()
sess.run(z3, feed_dict)
```

```py
x1 = tf.constant(1)
x2 = tf.constant(2)
z = tf.add(x1, x2)
init = tf.global_variables_initializer()
sess = tf.Session()
sess.run(init)
sess.run(z)
```

```py
c = tf.constant(5)
x = c + 1
y = x + 1
z = x + 2
sess = tf.Session()
print(sess.run(y))
print(sess.run(z))
sess.close()
```

```py
sess = tf.Session()
# Code that does something
```

```py
With tf.Session() as sess:
# code that does something
```

```py
with tf.Session() as sess:
print(sess.run(y))
print(sess.run(z))
```
